tooltips.pwaEnabled: Allows users to install the system as an app on their devices.
tooltips.pwaAppName: The application name shown on the device. Defaults to the Application Name.
tooltips.pwaShortName: A short name for the home screen (max 12 characters).
tooltips.pwaThemeColor: Hex color of the app UI, e.g. #337ab7.
tooltips.pwaBackgroundColor: Hex color of the splash screen background, e.g. #ffffff.
tooltips.pwaIcon: A square PNG image (512x512 recommended). If not set, the bundled icon is used.
tooltips.pwaPushEnabled: Sends system notifications to devices even when the site is closed. Requires cron/daemon to be running.
tooltips.pwaPushNotificationTypes: Which notification types are delivered as push messages.
tooltips.pwaStatsEnabled: Collects anonymous data about installed apps: random identifier, device type, OS version. No user data is stored.
tooltips.pwaSubscriptionsEnabled: Allows devices to register push subscriptions. When disabled, no new subscriptions are stored; existing ones are kept. Push delivery requires subscriptions.
tooltips.pwaVapidPublicKey: Generated automatically on installation. Used by browsers to authenticate push messages.
tooltips.pwaBottomBarEnabled: Shows a bottom bar with navigation buttons in the installed app on mobile devices.
tooltips.pwaBottomBarShowLabels: Shows a small text label under each icon. When disabled, only icons are shown (slightly larger).
tooltips.pwaBottomBarItems: Buttons of the bottom bar (max 8, 3-5 recommended). Works like the Tab List in User Interface settings: add entity tabs or custom URL buttons (label, icon, icon color, access options), reorder by drag and drop, edit URL buttons via the pencil icon.
